## Checklist

- [ ] JSON validates against `schema/test_case.schema.json`
- [ ] `expected_behavior` describes actual correct behavior (not just "should refuse")
- [ ] Filename exactly matches the `id` field
- [ ] `category` and `subcategory` are correct
